entity.label: Jeshua
entity.subtitle: Male
entity.description: A Levite appointed by Hezekiah to distribute offerings in the priestly cities (2 Chr. 31:15).

nodes.label: Jeshua
nodes.description: A Levite appointed by Hezekiah to distribute offerings in the priestly cities (2 Chr. 31:15).

verses.text: And next him were Eden, and Miniamin, and Jeshua, and Shemaiah, Amariah, and Shecaniah, in the cities of the priests, in their set office, to give to their brethren by courses, as well to the great as to the small:
